## PROFESSIONAL PROFILE
Senior Java Engineer with 12+ years designing and delivering secure, high‑availability microservices in superannuation/financial domains. Leads modernization (Java 21, Spring Boot 3.x), security hardening, and CI/CD release orchestration. Known for architecting agentic SDLC governance that accelerates delivery while maintaining coverage and compliance. Bridges legacy stability with modern, testable, AI‑assisted execution.
